query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, 'sasboss_enterprises' as tbl FROM sasboss_enterprises
UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'sasboss_services' FROM sasboss_services
UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'sasboss_did_inventory' FROM sasboss_did_inventory
UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'sasboss_pricebook' FROM sasboss_pricebook
UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'sasboss_invoices' FROM sasboss_invoices;
